summary: User reports that start.sh and stop.sh scripts are managing a different bot. Scripts look correct (they manage bot.py), but PM2 may have multiple processes. Need to check 'pm2 list' to see all running processes and clean up if needed.
current_status: Scripts appear correct but may be conflicting with other PM2 processes. Need to verify PM2 process list and ensure only vijdon-userbot is running.
